title: Project Miner PM Intake Local Review Checklist
objective: Add a browser-local, candidate-scoped PM review checklist to /pm-review/import-intake and include its checked state in the local Markdown PM brief without adding approval, persistence, import mutation, backend endpoints, hosted deployment, or live business-state writes.
active_role: Delegated Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / Local Implementation Executor
implementation_summary: Added a Local Review Checklist section to the Project Miner import-intake workbench.
The checklist is stored only in browser localStorage under pm-import-intake-review-checklist:${candidate_id}.
The checklist covers source freshness, warning review, PM decision capture, admission no-go review, approval storage understanding, hosted-parity awareness, and write-guardrail confirmation.
The exported Markdown PM brief now includes a Local Review Checklist section with checked and unchecked review-prep states.
The focused import-intake Playwright smoke now includes a catch-all unmocked /api/v1/** guard so the route cannot accidentally call live or unmocked API seams during local proof.
A read-only sidecar independently confirmed the candidate-scoped local checklist boundary and recommended the unmocked API guard.
validation_steps: corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts

corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-candidate.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-admission-plan.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-approval-readiness.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
validation_results: operations-web production build passed and route output included /pm-review/import-intake.

Focused import-intake Playwright smoke passed with 1 passed after verifying checklist initial state, checked count, Markdown brief checked/unchecked states, clear behavior, exact four reads, zero mutation calls, no unmocked API calls, and no approve/persist/submit/import buttons.
Focused PM intake Playwright suite passed with 4 passed.
Packet JSON parse passed with packet-json-ok.
git diff --check passed with line-ending normalization warnings only.
hosted_status: local_current_only; hosted promotion remains assigned to PM Lane 041A/041B
